title: The Big Killing
writer: Frank Butler, Grover Jones, Herman J. Mankiewicz
actors: Wallace Beery, Raymond Hatton, Anders Randolf
plot: The Beagles and the Hickses are two mountain families that have been feuding all their lives. The Hickses come up with a plan to get rid of their enemies once and for all by hiring two sharpshooters to finish them off. Turns out t...
